description.en: Shaved ice dessert with jelly made from banana flour

metaTitle.en: Oh Aew — Phuket's Famous Shaved Ice Dessert (From 15 THB)
metaTitle.nl: Oh Aew — Phukets Beroemde IJsdessert (Vanaf 15 THB)

metaDescription.en: Oh Aew (โอ้เอ๋ว) is a refreshing shaved ice dessert found only in Phuket Old Town. Translucent jelly, red beans, grass jelly & palm sugar syrup from 15 THB. Where to find it + history.
metaDescription.nl: Oh Aew (โอ้เอ๋ว) is een verfrissend ijsdessert dat alleen in Phuket Old Town te vinden is. Doorschijnende gelei, rode bonen & palmsuikersiroop vanaf 15 THB.
